sources.title: Bugchasing - Wikipedia
Generationing, Stealthing, and Gift Giving: Intentional HIV Transmission - PMC
Bug chasing and gift giving: the potential for HIV transmission - PubMed

evidence_for.text: Multiple peer-reviewed studies document the bugchasing subculture among MSM, confirming it is a real though rare phenomenon.
PMC research documents intentional HIV transmission practices including gift-giving, confirming non-consensual transmission variants exist.

evidence_against.text: Academic surveys find that while the fantasy is documented, the actual prevalence of deliberate seroconversion attempts is very low among barebackers generally.

research_note: No external coverage found; iceberg-chart speculation extrapolating from the real historical observation that isolated populations had higher disease vulnerability. The globalist-conspiracy framing has no dedicated sourcing.
No external coverage found; carnivorous plant biology is well-documented science, but the weaponized-plant experimentation claim is iceberg-chart lore with no verifiable sourcing.
No external coverage found; deep iceberg-chart lore only. No credible framework exists for soul transference between animal and plant kingdoms.
No external coverage found; philosophical iceberg-chart speculation with no dedicated sourcing. Loosely echoes ideas in downward causation philosophy but the framing is original to the iceberg.
No external coverage found; deep iceberg-chart lore extending upward-causality and population-control theories. No dedicated external sourcing.

sources.title: The Mysteries and Conspiracies Around Lithuanian Poetry - Wondergressive

evidence_for.text: A dedicated iceberg-explainer article catalogues the conspiracy theory that ancient Baltic dainas contain prophetic or extraterrestrial knowledge.

research_note: No external coverage found; iceberg-chart philosophical lore about divination and strategic obfuscation of foreknowledge. No dedicated sourcing.

sources.title: The Black Death, aliens, and the role of chaos in history - Skeptophilia
Plague-Bearing UFO - ObscUrban Legend Wikia

evidence_against.text: Scientific analysis has identified Yersinia pestis with well-understood terrestrial vectors; tissue samples from plague victims confirm a known bacterium, not an extraterrestrial pathogen.

research_note: No external coverage found for this specific iceberg framing. Loosely related to directed panspermia fringe hypotheses but no dedicated external sourcing.

sources.title: Ghost in the machine: inside the internet's paranormal history - Huck

evidence_for.text: A journalism investigation documents the longstanding internet folklore tradition of haunted, magical, or occult-linked early websites as a genuine subculture.

research_note: No external coverage found; iceberg-chart lore extending the Abandoned Internet theory with elite occult usage. No dedicated external sourcing.
No external coverage found; iceberg-chart lore. Scientific consensus is that solar panels capture a negligible fraction of solar output and cannot affect stellar processes.

sources.title: False: Microchips have been found in fossils - Logically Facts
250-million-years old microchip from Russia is fake news - Slovak Spectator

evidence_against.text: The most cited example - a Russian fossil claimed to be a 250-million-year-old microchip - was identified by paleontologists as a crinoid (sea lily) cross-section, a common marine organism.
Fact-checkers formally rated the microchips-in-fossils claim as false, tracing all major examples to misidentified natural formations or hoaxes.

research_note: No external coverage found; deep iceberg-chart speculative lore about inter-timeline bleed effects from time travel. No dedicated sourcing.

sources.title: We must kill the black snake: Prophecy and prayer at Standing Rock - CBC News
Black snake prophecy at center of Dakota oil pipeline battle - Spokesman-Review
The Native American Prophecy of the Black Snake - Bioneers

evidence_for.text: The ancient Lakota prophecy of a black snake desecrating sacred lands gained major media attention in 2016 when Standing Rock Sioux applied it to the Dakota Access Pipeline.
The Sioux Nation formally placed the Black Snake Prophecy at the center of their pipeline resistance narrative, reported by Bloomberg and regional press.

research_note: No external coverage found; iceberg-chart theological speculation extending the Theosophist Geology theory. No dedicated external sourcing.
No external coverage found; iceberg-chart lore extending the Genesis Location theory about the Garden of Eden. No dedicated external sourcing.

sources.title: Ancient astronauts - Wikipedia
Ancient Aliens and the Bible - Christian Research Institute

evidence_against.text: The Christian Research Institute and mainstream scholars identify the ancient astronaut reading of scripture as a misinterpretation ignoring historical and linguistic context.

sources.title: Oxygen Is Hallucinogenic - Iceberg Database
Oxygen as a Hallucinogen - Wondergressive
1979 Sydney Ghost Train fire - Wikipedia
Luna Park Ghost Train Fire - Paranormal Strange Wiki

evidence_for.text: A photograph of child victim Damien Godson posing with a figure in a horned demonic mask before the fire fueled Moloch-sacrifice theories among conspiracy researchers.

evidence_against.text: Wikipedia documents that investigators considered organised crime (Abe Saffron) the more credible arson motive; the Moloch connection was promoted by pop-artist Martin Sharp, not investigators.

research_note: No external coverage found; iceberg-chart lore extending satanic-elite child sacrifice theories. No dedicated sourcing.

sources.title: Neanderthal extinction - Wikipedia
Neanderthals were not inferior to modern humans, study finds - ScienceDaily
Neandertal Demise: An Archaeological Analysis of the Modern Human Superiority Complex - PMC

evidence_for.text: Recent research concludes Neanderthals were not cognitively inferior to modern humans, used symbolic art, and had larger average brain sizes.

evidence_against.text: Academic analysis critiques the modern human superiority complex as an interpretive bias; no evidence establishes clear Neanderthal superiority either.

sources.title: Extraterrestrial Life in the Thermosphere: Plasmas, UAP, Pre-Life - SCIRP
Are UFOs Living Creatures in Higher Atmosphere? - Infinity Explorers

evidence_for.text: A paper in SCIRP proposes plasma-based entities in the thermosphere as a candidate explanation for some UAP sightings, citing NASA shuttle footage of plasma objects behaving like organisms.

research_note: No external coverage found; deep iceberg-chart lore extending the Nephilim Earth and aura theories. No dedicated external sourcing.

sources.title: Expanding Earth - Wikipedia
Expanding Earth: The Strange (And Wrong) Hypothesis - IFLScience

evidence_against.text: The Expanding Earth hypothesis was superseded and discredited once plate tectonics became the accepted geological model in the 1960s; satellite observations confirm no net size increase.

research_note: No external coverage found; iceberg-chart lore extending the Strip Mining Hell theory. Original truth score of 75 appears to be a data entry error; no sources support any component of this claim.

sources.title: Search and Rescue Woods - TV Tropes
Stairs To Nowhere: When Creepypasta Becomes Urban Legend - EverythingGP

evidence_for.text: The creepypasta originated from the Reddit /r/nosleep series Search and Rescue Woods (2015) by Kerry Hammond, which spawned a widespread trend of reported staircase sightings in national forests.

evidence_against.text: Analysis of the phenomenon notes a near-total absence of photographic evidence; the stories trace back to a fictional nosleep series and anecdotal accounts.

research_note: No external coverage found; iceberg-chart lore combining field-consciousness and ghost theories. No dedicated external sourcing.
No external coverage found; deep iceberg-chart lore about inaccessible deep-web data repositories. No dedicated external sourcing.

No external coverage found; deep iceberg-chart lore extending the Earths Divine Aura theory. No dedicated external sourcing.

No external coverage found; iceberg-chart lore extending field-consciousness and memetic theory. No dedicated external sourcing.

sources.title: Technological singularity - Transhumanism Wiki

evidence_for.text: The concept maps onto the technological singularity and transhumanist expansion of human perception and capability, a concept seriously discussed in futurist and academic circles.

sources.title: How The NPC Meme Tries To Dehumanize - Kotaku
The politics of the NPC meme: Reactionary subcultural practice and vernacular theory - SAGE Journals

evidence_against.text: Academic analysis situates the NPC meme as a dehumanising reactionary subcultural practice; the inner-voice research it relies on was widely misinterpreted to support soullessness claims.

sources.title: Out-of-place artifact - Wikipedia
17 Out-of-Place Artifacts Said to Suggest High-Tech Prehistoric Civilizations - Ancient Origins

evidence_for.text: Claimed OOPArts such as the Antikythera mechanism genuinely surprised researchers with their sophistication, providing a kernel of fact for the broader advanced-ancient-tech narrative.

evidence_against.text: Wikipedia notes most purported OOPArts result from misidentification, wishful thinking, or deliberate hoaxes rather than evidence of suppressed advanced technology.

research_note: No external coverage found; iceberg-chart lore about corporate employee surveillance and disappearing investigators. No dedicated external sourcing.
No external coverage found for this specific framing; extends the iceberg NPC Paradigm theory. No dedicated external sourcing.

sources.title: Religious Responses to the Black Death - World History Encyclopedia
Comets, omens and fear: understanding plague in the Middle Ages - Oxford Faculty of English

evidence_for.text: Medieval and ancient communities routinely attributed epidemic disease to divine will, organising religious processions and rituals around disease events - a documented historical reality.
Oxford scholarship documents how medieval chroniclers framed plague as divine communication, interpreting comets as omens and linking outbreaks to supernatural agency.

research_note: No external coverage found; iceberg-chart speculative spiritual theory about natural-process reincarnation across species. No dedicated external sourcing.
No external coverage found; iceberg-chart speculative evolutionary convergence theory. No dedicated external sourcing.
No external coverage found; deep iceberg-chart lore extending the Mundane Reincarnation theory. No dedicated external sourcing.

No external coverage found for the term sky snag specifically. The theory is a variant of atmospheric-mirage and chemtrail UFO-explanation theories, both of which have independent coverage, but this specific name and framing appears to be original iceberg-chart lore.
